01
Wearable AI · Agentic Pipeline · Hardware

JobHunt
Glasses

Tap Apply on a job card displayed on Meta Ray-Ban Display glasses. 60 seconds later, a Claude-tailored LaTeX resume PDF lands in Gmail. Neural Band gesture → Vercel → Adzuna → Claude scoring + tailoring → tectonic LaTeX → Gmail SMTP. Hands-free. No laptop.

RAG · Production · Full-Stack

FRAGAI
RAG System

Production-deployed perfume recommendation RAG — hybrid BM25 + semantic search with Reciprocal Rank Fusion across 1,800 fragrances. Sub-500ms latency, $0.001 per query, 126 real user searches. CI/CD auto-deploys, 10 production issues resolved live.

03
Agentic AI · Computer Vision · Full-Stack

Meal Prep
Grocery AI

Paste a cooking reel URL. GPT-4o Vision samples keyframes + NLP parses captions. Custom ingredient resolver deduplicates, hits Amazon + Walmart APIs for live prices, forecasts 4-week grocery budget within ±8%, exports structured Excel. 20 minutes → 45 seconds.

Narrative Bias in LLMs
NLP Research

Quantified how GPT and Gemini distort moral framing, sentiment, and gender representation across 200 narratives. SBERT, BERTScore, BERTopic, UMAP, HDBSCAN.

SBERT 0.6042 vs 0.5769BERTScore F1 0.84-0.86
Hotel Demand Forecasting
Time-Series · BI

Revenue management forecasting across 3 NDA hotel properties. ARIMA, XGBoost, Random Forest benchmarked. Automated BI dashboards for stakeholders.

MAE 10.7-14.5MASE <0.530-day horizon
Distributed Task Queue
Distributed Systems · Azure

Async job processing with priority scheduling and dead letter recovery. Redis + Azure Service Bus. 94% message loss reduction, 99.2% uptime.

10K+ jobs/day99.2% uptime94% loss reduction
CascadeGuard
AI Safety · GPU Inference

Three-tier GPU-resident guardrail cascade with Bayesian confidence router. Fast embedding classifier under 5ms, LLM judge under 500ms.

<5ms tier-1Bayesian routingCUDA optimized
GPU Cluster Simulation Lab
MLOps · Kubernetes · CUDA

4 virtual GPU nodes simulating distributed AI training. DCGM + Prometheus + Grafana. Ansible + Terraform IaC cut cluster setup from 3 hours to 15 min.

4 GPU nodes25% throughput gain15min IaC setup
Skin Disease Diagnosis (IEEE)
Medical AI · Published

IEEE-published multimodal deep learning. Xception + ResNet-50 + LSTM late fusion on ISIC dataset (2,357 images, 7 classes). ~90% accuracy.
